description: Designed for elegance and comfort, rockport shoes are engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet. This makes rockport shoes an absolute favourite for everyday wear, as it makes for a great set of casual formals with a solid blend of form and function. Upper Full-grain leather upper with nappa lining for added strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the hide This leather upper also makes it easy to clean and enhances shoe life Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Circular flex grooves provide durable grip on various surfaces Added support on inner arch of the foot for better support Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
